name: NVZver
description: Vision — a personal, model-agnostic agentic engineering system. Domain-neutral core, on-demand packs.

plugins.name: lsa
plugins.description: Living Spec Architecture: spec-first methodology with six skills (init, specify, plan, verify, sync, revise-constitution) and human gates at every phase.

plugins.name: helper
plugins.description: Friendly fact-grounded assistant: `/help` slash command + auto-engaging subagent on user-friction signals (consecutive lsa-specify gate rejections, free-form `what is X?` mid-flow). Depends on `core` (output discipline) and `lsa` (gate-reject signal). Under construction — scaffold ships ahead of agent + command bodies; see vision/specs/features/2026-05-21-helper-agent/.
